content:
hello! another newbie looking for some team building ideas with my current roster. my current team for story purposes (partway through chapter 5) is mono aequor (caecus/pontos/miryam/tulu or support gmurphy) and i've basically tripped up fantastically playing anything else, especially in endgame modes. looking for some advice on who to run together to make several useable teams and not just living in my biased fish world all the time 

caecus and murphy are my favourite characters so far so i'd love to main them. i'm also planning to pull for pollux and corposant when they rerun, as well as castor and arachne in the future.

thank you!

i'll try the Autita-Celeste team seems fun to play but need to continue story to chapter 7 hahaha
Didn't really had time to continue ch6 but damn story really good
got it~ I will try out the team combo appreciate your help <:YangyangLove:1091193604959113317>
